summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The iShares Core MSCI Total International Stock ETF (IXUS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI AC World ex USA IMI index, a market-cap-weighted index of global stocks covering 99% of the global market capitalization outside the US. IXUS was launched on Oct 18, 2012 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: MSCI AC World ex USA IMI

data.title: A beginner-friendly ETF portfolio that requires almost no maintenance and delivers long-term results
data.text: For a portfolio to count as being both good and easy, it needs to be anchored with a hearty helping of stock market-tracking index funds.

data.title: The S&P 500 Is a Megacap Tech Fund. Where to Invest Instead.
data.text: To capture the market's full potential return, investment strategists recommend adding exposure to international markets, value stocks, and small- and mid-cap companies.

data.title: Final Trades: Netflix, ON Semi & more
data.text: The "Halftime Report" traders give their top picks to watch for the second half.

news.t: A beginner-friendly ETF portfolio that requires almost no maintenance and delivers long-term results
The S&P 500 Is a Megacap Tech Fund. Where to Invest Instead.

holdings.infoBox: IXUS is an equity ETF with a total of 4626 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 4.37%, Samsung Electronics at 2.12%, SK hynix at 1.86%, ASML Holding at 1.57%, and Tencent Holdings at 0.85%.
